We're thrilled to launch Flodesk Studio! Flodesk has always believed that great design should be accessible to anyone. That belief took us to build a brand that looks like nothing else in our space. Flodesk Studio is a place to make beautiful emails, built by the world's top designers, accelerated by AI, finished by you. Describe what you want and Studio brings it to life on-brand, ready to refine in chat or perfect by hand. Use it inside Flodesk, or export to any ESP and send from there. Flodesk studio is free to try while we are in beta. We hope you like it!

BEEPro is an excellent online email and landing page tool that has saved us time and money spent liaising with developers. It's effortless to create high quality email designs and have the reassurance that they are going to land in our clients inboxes looking the way we want them too. The drag and drop functionality allows us to easily produce emails without the need for complicated HTML. The view on mobile and desktop function is brilliant and allows us to cater for all devices.

I believe Postcards – the Drag and Drop email template maker – demonstrates how wonderful they are. It's so simple to use that even a child can do it. Beautifully coded email templates that function on all platforms (desktop, laptop, and mobile) and are just stunning. The pre-designed header, text, and footer, among other things, are exact and attractive. I like practically everything about it, and it saves a lot of time for people who are short on time.

I’ve used a lot of email builders, but Postcards from Designmodo stood out because it gives me speed and control. The templates look great, the HTML is clean, and the export workflow is painless. It’s one of those rare tools that designers and developers can both love, easy for marketers to drag and drop, but technical enough for devs to trust in production.

results.title: Designmodo: No-code email template and website builders. | Product Hunt
results.content:
I’ve used a lot of email builders, but Postcards from Designmodo stood out because it gives me speed and control. The templates look great, the HTML is clean, and the export workflow is painless. It’s one of those rare tools that designers and developers can both love, easy for marketers to drag and drop, but technical enough for devs to trust in production.

Ratings

Ease of use

Value for money

12 views

•1 review [...] View all

4.8

Based on 18 reviews

Review Designmodo?

Reviewers mostly praise Designmodo, especially its Postcards builder, for being fast, simple, and easy to learn while still producing polished, clean HTML email templates. Users say the templates look strong, editing is smooth, exports are painless, and the tool works well for marketers, designers, and developers alike. Customer service also gets positive mention. The main criticism is value for money: one reviewer says pricing feels hard to justify for small businesses with light email needs, and another notes some customization limits and possible design fatigue.
